raw:
## Completed
Implemented the impact-based Foreman guard:
- Scratch/out-of-repo/prose paths bypass Foreman.
- In-repo code/config/default paths still gate.
- Bash mutation targets are classified path-mechanically and conservatively gate on impactful/unknown targets.
- `index.ts` now passes real cwd/git-root/scratch context into the guard.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/guard.ts` - added pure `isNoImpactPath`, resolver/context support, and impact-aware edit/write/bash classification.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - wired tool-call guard with cwd, git-root walker, and scratch dirs.
- `extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh` - added hermetic tests for scratch, out-of-repo, prose, config/code, bash targets, and path-boundary behavior.

## How To Verify
`cd /Users/a1241968/Desktop/Oscar/my-pi-harness && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh`

## Notes
Verification passed locally with all four required fast tests green.
